title: hydrocotyle spinulifera
intro: Hydrocotyle spinulifera, also known as Spiny Pennywort or Chinese Pennywort, is a plant species that belongs to the family Hydrocotylaceae. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, headache, and respiratory issues, due to its health benefits such as lowering blood pressure and improving cognitive function. Hydrocotyle spinulifera can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and capsules, making it accessible for individuals to incorporate into their wellness routines.
